This template applies only to public open-source repositories that explicitly
accept pull requests. Private/proprietary repositories (including Gideon)
do **not** accept ordinary external pull requests through this template.

---

- [ ] This change is scoped and single-purpose.
- [ ] No credentials, secrets, customer data, private logs, or production
      identifiers are included.
- [ ] No unapproved dependency, copied code, vendored material, generated
      artifact, or external-service introduction.
- [ ] Relevant local validation has been performed (lint, test, build as
      applicable).
- [ ] Documentation has been updated where needed.
- [ ] No security-sensitive details are disclosed publicly.
